settings.text: We wanted the glow. You know the one.
That warm light on every table in every restaurant you love. We couldn't find it for home. So we made it.

Real candles drip wax on your table, burn out halfway through dinner, and you can't use them outside when the wind picks up. Wired lamps need a plug — which means cables across floors and no chance on the patio. Cheap LED alternatives look like they belong in a student flat, not on your dining table.

Meanwhile, every boutique hotel and neighbourhood restaurant has this beautiful, warm, wireless glow on every table. Why couldn't we have that at home?
Lettii is the lamp you've seen on every boutique hotel table — redesigned, rechargeable, and finally yours.

That glow isn't magic. It's just good design: the right light temperature, the right diffusion, no cord in sight. The only thing keeping it in restaurants was a price tag north of £100 and a "trade only" minimum order.

settings.title: 12-hour battery
settings.description: One charge lasts a full evening. Low brightness stretches even longer. USB-C, like your phone.

settings.title: IP54 waterproof
settings.description: Rain, splashes, garden sprinklers. Take it outside without thinking twice.

settings.title: Touch to dim
settings.description: Stepless dimming. Tap to turn on. Touch and hold to find your level. No app, no remote.

settings.title: Designed to be seen
settings.description: Not a gadget. A lamp. Premium materials, warm light, the kind of design you'd choose even if it had a cord.

settings.text:
We don't think lighting should be complicated. One lamp. Every setting. Restaurant to bedside to garden party.

We're a small UK brand. We answer our own emails. We ship fast, we make returns painless, and we stand behind every lamp with a 30-day money-back guarantee.

settings.heading: 30-day guarantee. No questions asked.
settings.description: Try Lettii in your space. If it doesn't change the room, send it back — free returns, full refund within 5 business days. We'd rather you tried it and returned it than never tried it at all.

settings.heading: Stay in the glow.
settings.description: Styling ideas, new lamp drops, and the occasional offer — straight to your inbox. Plus 10% off your first order.
